concepts.finding: Repository categorizes ~200 ML papers across 9 categories: CTR/CVR prediction, Embeddings, Session-based Recommendations, Recommendations, A/B Tests, Ranking, DNN Compression, Nearest Neighbor Search, Surveys, Keywords Extraction.
concepts.implication: Provides a structured taxonomy of ML application areas relevant to search and recommendation systems.
concepts.open_question: Which categories have the most cross-pollination potential for search/intent classification tasks?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Papers from Embeddings and Ranking categories will provide the most directly transferable methods for query understanding systems.
